rules_locked.weekly_highlights: Current week only. Specific dated events and measurable transportation friction. Max 4.
rules_locked.venue_regulars: Keep partner and recurring venues even if no specific performer is announced.
rules_locked.venue_specials: Specific dated events, bands, concerts, or demand drivers.
rules_locked.revenue_filter_rule: Only include events likely to create parking, alcohol, late-night, crowd, or group transportation demand.
rules_locked.expired_cleanup: Remove events before June 15 unless required for operational context.
rules_locked.future_watch: Maintain major future events separately from current-week demand.
